attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CG1_MTL_ATP_RULES.RULE_ID, STG_CG1_MTL_ATP_RULES.RULE_NAME, STG_CG1_MTL_ATP_RULES.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CG1_MTL_ATP_RULES.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CG1_MTL_ATP_RULES.CREATION_DATE, STG_CG1_MTL_ATP_RULES.CREATED_BY, STG_CG1_MTL_ATP_RULES.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, STG_CG1_MTL_ATP_RULES.DESCRIPTION, STG_CG1_MTL_ATP_RULES.ACCUMULATE_AVAILABLE_FLAG, STG_CG1_MTL_ATP_RULES.BACKWARD_CONSUMPTION_FLAG, STG_CG1_MTL_ATP_RULES.FORWARD_CONSUMPTION_FLAG, STG_CG1_MTL_ATP_RULES.PAST_DUE_DEMAND_CUTOFF_FENCE, STG_CG1_MTL_ATP_RULES.PAST_DUE_SUPPLY_CUTOFF_FENCE, STG_CG1_MTL_ATP_RULES.INFINITE_SUPPLY_FENCE_CODE, STG_CG1_MTL_ATP_RULES.INFINITE_SUPPLY_TIME_FENCE, STG_CG1_MTL_ATP_RULES.ACCEPTABLE_EARLY_FENCE, STG_CG1_MTL_ATP_RULES.ACCEPTABLE_LATE_FENCE, STG_CG1_MTL_ATP_RULES.DEFAULT_ATP_SOURCES, STG_CG1_MTL_ATP_RULES.DEMAND_CLASS_ATP_FLAG, STG_CG1_MTL_ATP_RULES.INCLUDE_SALES_ORDERS, STG_CG1_MTL_ATP_RULES.INCLUDE_DISCRETE_WIP_DEMAND, STG_CG1_MTL_ATP_RULES.INCLUDE_REP_WIP_DEMAND, STG_CG1_MTL_ATP_RULES.INCLUDE_NONSTD_WIP_DEMAND, STG_CG1_MTL_ATP_RULES.INCLUDE_DISCRETE_MPS, STG_CG1_MTL_ATP_RULES.MPS_DESIGNATOR, STG_CG1_MTL_ATP_RULES.INCLUDE_USER_DEFINED_DEMAND, STG_CG1_MTL_ATP_RULES.USER_ATP_DEMAND_TABLE_NAME, STG_CG1_MTL_ATP_RULES.INCLUDE_PURCHASE_ORDERS, STG_CG1_MTL_ATP_RULES.INCLUDE_DISCRETE_WIP_RECEIPTS, STG_CG1_MTL_ATP_RULES.INCLUDE_REP_WIP_RECEIPTS, STG_CG1_MTL_ATP_RULES.INCLUDE_NONSTD_WIP_RECEIPTS, STG_CG1_MTL_ATP_RULES.INCLUDE_INTERORG_TRANSFERS, STG_CG1_MTL_ATP_RULES.INCLUDE_ONHAND_AVAILABLE, STG_CG1_MTL_ATP_RULES.INCLUDE_USER_DEFINED_SUPPLY, STG_CG1_MTL_ATP_RULES.USER_ATP_SUPPLY_TABLE_NAME, STG_CG1_MTL_ATP_RULES.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY, STG_CG1_MTL_ATP_RULES.ATTRIBUTE1, STG_CG1_MTL_ATP_RULES.ATTRIBUTE2, STG_CG1_MTL_ATP_RULES.ATTRIBUTE3, STG_CG1_MTL_ATP_RULES.ATTRIBUTE4, STG_CG1_MTL_ATP_RULES.ATTRIBUTE5, STG_CG1_MTL_ATP_RULES.ATTRIBUTE6, STG_CG1_MTL_ATP_RULES.ATTRIBUTE7, STG_CG1_MTL_ATP_RULES.ATTRIBUTE8, STG_CG1_MTL_ATP_RULES.ATTRIBUTE9, STG_CG1_MTL_ATP_RULES.ATTRIBUTE10, STG_CG1_MTL_ATP_RULES.ATTRIBUTE11, STG_CG1_MTL_ATP_RULES.ATTRIBUTE12, STG_CG1_MTL_ATP_RULES.ATTRIBUTE13, STG_CG1_MTL_ATP_RULES.ATTRIBUTE14, STG_CG1_MTL_ATP_RULES.ATTRIBUTE15, STG_CG1_MTL_ATP_RULES.REQUEST_ID, STG_CG1_MTL_ATP_RULES.PROGRAM_APPLICATION_ID, STG_CG1_MTL_ATP_RULES.PROGRAM_ID, STG_CG1_MTL_ATP_RULES.PROGRAM_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CG1_MTL_ATP_RULES.ACCUMULATION_WINDOW, STG_CG1_MTL_ATP_RULES.INCLUDE_REP_MPS, STG_CG1_MTL_ATP_RULES.INCLUDE_INTERNAL_REQS, STG_CG1_MTL_ATP_RULES.INCLUDE_VENDOR_REQS, STG_CG1_MTL_ATP_RULES.INCLUDE_INTERNAL_ORDERS, STG_CG1_MTL_ATP_RULES.INCLUDE_FLOW_SCHEDULE_DEMAND, STG_CG1_MTL_ATP_RULES.INCLUDE_FLOW_SCHEDULE_RECEIPTS, STG_CG1_MTL_ATP_RULES.AGGREGATE_TIME_FENCE_CODE, STG_CG1_MTL_ATP_RULES.AGGREGATE_TIME_FENCE, STG_CG1_MTL_ATP_RULES.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CG1_MTL_ATP_RULES.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CG1_MTL_ATP_RULES.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CG1_MTL_ATP_RULES.REFRESH_DATETIME 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_MTL_ATP_RULES STG_CG1_MTL_ATP_RULES,
 (
 select  RULE_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_MTL_ATP_RULES
 minus
 select  RULE_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CG1_MTL_ATP_RULES
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.RULE_ID = STG_CG1_MTL_ATP_RULES.RULE_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG1_MTL_ATP_RULES.REFRESH_DATETIME

attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_MTL_ATP_RULES)
